_comment: ledType=6 (NEO_RGB) is INTENTIONAL — this panel's LED part ships in native RGB byte order, NOT the WS2812B GRB default (82). Confirmed visually after a deploy session showed red/green swap (commit aa382f93f8). orientation=3 = HORIZONTAL_ZIGZAG: a single strip snaked L→R / R→L across rows (hand-wired panel). buttonPin=1 = physical generator-cycle button on GPIO D1.
